title: Build Utilities & Packaging

modules.name: utils.js
exports: parseFrontmatter(content: string): { frontmatter: object, body: string }
readPatterns(rootDir: string): { patterns: PatternGroup[], antipatterns: PatternGroup[] }
replacePlaceholders(content: string, provider: string, commandNames?: string[], allSkillNames?: string[]): string
prefixSkillReferences(content: string, prefix: string, skillNames: string[], commandPrefix?: string): string
constants: PROVIDER_PLACEHOLDERS: map of provider → { model, config_file, ask_instruction, command_prefix }

modules.name: zip.js
exports: createProviderZip(providerDir: string, distDir: string, providerName: string): Promise<void>

modules.name: render-page.js
module_state: cachedHeader: string | null  (singleton cache for header partial)
constants: ROOT_DIR: resolved two levels up from __dirname

modules.name: render-markdown.js
exports: createRenderer(opts?: { knownSkillIds?: Set<string>, currentSkillId?: string | null }): marked.Renderer
renderMarkdown(markdown: string, opts?: { knownSkillIds?: Set<string>, currentSkillId?: string | null }): string
internal_functions: resolveHref(href: string, ctx: { knownSkillIds: Set<string>, currentSkillId: string|null }): { href: string, external: boolean }

key_relationships: render-page.js depends_on render-markdown.js (renderMarkdown called by build scripts that compose both)
render-page.js calls applyActiveNav() internally within renderPage()
render-markdown.js createRenderer() calls resolveHref() inside renderer.link hook
utils.js readSourceFiles() calls parseFrontmatter() for each SKILL.md
utils.js readSourceFiles() calls readFilesRecursive() indirectly (separate helper)
utils.js replacePlaceholders() calls escapeRegex() for command-prefix substitution
zip.js createAllZips() calls createProviderZip() twice (universal, universal-prefixed)
zip.js createProviderZip() uses archiver library with glob pattern
call_chains: renderPage(opts) → readHeaderPartial() [cached] → applyActiveNav() → return HTML string
important_notes: parseFrontmatter: custom YAML parser supporting key-value, booleans, arrays, nested objects (no external YAML dep)
readPatterns: reads only source/skills/impeccable/SKILL.md; parses DO/DON'T in both markdown-bullet and XML-prose form
render-page.js caches header partial after first read (module-level cachedHeader)
createRenderer uses custom marked.Renderer for headings (stable slugs + {#custom-id} syntax), links (resolveHref), and code (copy button wrapper)
createProviderZip uses archiver npm package for cross-platform ZIP (avoids shell zip)
generateYamlFrontmatter: serializes objects with arrays, booleans, and quote-escaped strings back to YAML
